MARISAMOD-MINI_HAKKERO.title: Mini Hakkero
MARISAMOD-MINI_HAKKERO.description: When you play a card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charge-Up[/gold].
MARISAMOD-MINI_HAKKERO.flavor: A mini-Eight Trigram Furnace, a gift from Rinosuke when Marisa left her parents.
MARISAMOD-BEWITCHED_HAKKERO.title: Bewitched Hakkero
MARISAMOD-BEWITCHED_HAKKERO.description: When you play a card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charge-Up[/gold]. Gain 1 more if it is an Attack.
MARISAMOD-BEWITCHED_HAKKERO.flavor: Its firepower is on a new level, but is it ok to use a bewitched tool?
